summary: Phase 3 detailed execution plan — Fault Tolerance + Data Processing. Covers the Watchdog system (stale node detection, chunk rescue, reliability scoring), data processing pipeline (CSV/Parquet sharding, data assembler/merger), Gemini API integration (Tier 2 verifier that checks catalog configs against user code and adapts, Tier 3 full generator as last resort), Kaniko rootless image builder, and the python-data Docker image.
